summary: An NBC News / NBC Nightly News sit-down interview segment ('ONE-ON-ONE WITH ACTING ICE DIRECTOR') in which the official discusses locating 300,000 unaccompanied migrant children and rescuing kids from trafficking. It is a standard broadcast talking-head interview with a news chyron, not a produced or music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: NBC NEWS REPORTS / NBC NIGHTLY NEWS / ONE-ON-ONE WITH ACTING ICE DIRECTOR
